name: NB Bancorp, Inc.
summary: PARTI FORWARD-LOOKING STATEMENTS In this Annual Report on Form 10-K, the terms we, our, and us refer to NB Bancorp,Inc. and Needham Bank, unless the context indicates another meaning. In addition, we sometimes refer to NB Bancorp,Inc. as NB Bancorp or the Company and to Needham Bank as the Bank. Certain statements contained in this Annual Report on form 10-K, that are not historical facts, may be considered forward-looking statements, within the meaning of Section 27A of the Securities Act of 19...
